entity.summary: Native decentralized exchange on Sonic using Algebra concentrated-liquidity infrastructure together with ve(3,3)-style incentives and modular plugin integrations for swaps and liquidity management.
entity.notes: Current first-party surfaces identify SwapX as Sonic's native DEX and publish the protocol's Algebra-based AMM implementation. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, or successor is asserted.

evidence.title: SwapX official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party SwapX application and protocol domain for swaps and liquidity on Sonic.

evidence.title: SwapX Algebra implementation
evidence.notes: Official SwapX organization repository publishes the Algebra AMM codebase used by the exchange and confirms an active public implementation surface.
